tagline: Backyards were made for back floats

hero.badge_2: Dan's Best of the Best Winner
hero.headline: Your Long Island Backyard Deserves Better
hero.subheadline: For nearly 40 years, Islandia Pools has designed, built, and maintained stunning pools across the North Fork and the Hamptons. From custom installations to weekly care, we handle it all so you can enjoy the backyard you have always wanted.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool & Spa Solutions<br class="hidden md:block"> Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From dream pool designs to weekly maintenance and everything in between, Islandia Pools is the only call you need to make for your backyard.

cards.title: Custom Pool Design & Build
cards.description: Award-winning pool installations tailored to your property, style, and budget. Serving the North Fork and Hamptons with designs that turn heads.

cards.title: Bullfrog Spas & Swim Spas
cards.description: Authorized Bullfrog Spas dealer featuring the exclusive JetPak Therapy System. Design your perfect spa online with interchangeable jetted seats.

cards.title: Pool Maintenance & Repairs
cards.description: Keep your pool pristine season after season. Weekly cleaning, chemical balancing, equipment repairs, and opening/closing services.

cards.title: Outdoor Kitchens & Grills
cards.description: Custom and pre-built outdoor kitchen designs with certified propane gas grill installation. Create the ultimate outdoor entertaining space.

cards.title: Backyard Renovations
cards.description: Complete outdoor transformations combining pools, spas, kitchens, and landscaping into a cohesive backyard retreat your family will love.

cards.title: Retail Pool & Spa Supplies
cards.description: Visit our Riverhead store for BioGuard chemicals, pool accessories, equipment, and expert advice from people who actually know pools.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Dream Backyard

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Consultation
steps.description: Tell us about your vision. We will visit your property, discuss your goals, and provide an honest, detailed proposal with no hidden costs or pressure.

steps.title: We Design & Build It Right
steps.description: Our experienced team brings your vision to life with award-winning craftsmanship. You will have a dedicated project manager keeping you informed every step of the way.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Backyard Paradise
steps.description: Dive into your new pool, relax in your spa, or fire up the outdoor kitchen. And when you need maintenance, we are just a phone call away.

about.label: Why Long Islanders Trust Us
about.headline: Family-Founded, Community-Rooted, Quality-Obsessed
about.description: Founded in 1987 by John and Boanne Wysoczanski, Islandia Pools was born from a simple frustration: the family could not find a pool company they could trust. Now led by Dave Freeborn, who grew up in the business, we have served over 5,000 homeowners and architects across the East End. Every project gets the same hands-on attention that built our reputation nearly four decades ago.

features.title: Nearly 40 Years of Expertise
features.description: Since 1987, we have built our reputation one backyard at a time across the North Fork, the Hamptons, and all of Suffolk County.

features.title: Award-Winning Craftsmanship
features.description: Recognized as Dan's Best of the Best and trusted by hundreds of architects. Our work speaks for itself in backyards across Long Island.

features.title: Full-Service, One Company
features.description: Design, build, maintain, and supply — all under one roof. No juggling contractors. One team that knows your pool inside and out.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project is unique, and so is our pricing. Request a free consultation and we will provide a detailed, honest quote tailored to your needs.

guarantee.headline: Our "Backyard Happiness" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with our work, we will come back and make it right at no additional charge. We have built our business on trust and integrity for nearly 40 years, and we stand behind every project, every service visit, and every product we sell. Your satisfaction is not just a promise — it is how we have earned 5,000+ loyal customers.

faqs.question: What areas of Long Island do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve the entire East End of Long Island including the North Fork, the Hamptons, Riverhead, Calverton, and all of Suffolk County. If you are on the East End, we can take care of you.

faqs.question: How long does a custom pool installation take?
faqs.answer: Most residential pool installations take 6 to 10 weeks depending on the design complexity, permits, and weather. We keep you informed every step of the way with a dedicated project manager.

faqs.question: Do you offer pool maintenance plans?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We offer weekly and bi-weekly maintenance plans that include cleaning, chemical balancing, equipment checks, and more. We also handle seasonal openings and closings.

faqs.question: Can I visit your retail store?
faqs.answer: Yes! Our full-service retail location is at 108 Fishel Ave in Riverhead, NY. Stop by for BioGuard chemicals, pool and spa supplies, accessories, and expert advice from our team.

faqs.question: Are you an authorized Bullfrog Spas dealer?
faqs.answer: Yes, we are an authorized Bullfrog Spas dealer. You can even design your spa online using their exclusive JetPak Therapy System configurator, then come see us to bring it to life.

testimonials.name: Paul C.
testimonials.text: From start to finish, things went smooth and right on schedule. They do the right thing by putting their customers first. Any complaint or concern I had, they always took care of it, and fast.

testimonials.name: Dr. Michelle I.
testimonials.text: Professional, knowledgeable, and attentive. They helped design a backyard oasis, were clear about pricing, and were not bothered by changes we wanted to make.

testimonials.name: Tracy B.
testimonials.text: Dave, Cheryl and the entire crew at Islandia Pools are professionals. Responsive and knowledgeable as well as dependable. I highly recommend this pool company.

contact.headline:
Ready to Transform Your
Long Island Backyard?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-pressure consultation from a team with nearly 40 years of experience. Visit our Riverhead showroom or give us a call today.
